blocks.text: Carlsen's Candidates quest begins Wednesday — Norway, hold your breath

Magnus Carlsen opens his FIDE Candidates Tournament campaign at 16:00 Wednesday. The winner earns the right to challenge for the World Chess Championship — and Carlsen is the reason everyone is watching.
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen, FIDE Candidates Tournament Round 1 — the biggest chess event of the year
🎾 Sun 06:00 — Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters opens, clay season officially arrives
